generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor current I_M, streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorMountEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor‑mounted position encoder providing shaft angle, streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder downstream of the gearbox providing output shaft angle, streamed via MQTT"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‑to‑virtual interaction
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
    base:desc "Live motor current I_M time‑series transmitted over MQTT"
]

instance MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorMountEncoder
    base:desc "Live angle data from motor‑mounted encoder transmitted over MQTT"
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
    base:desc "Live angle data from gearbox encoder transmitted over MQTT"
]

// C10: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance MotorAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of motor shaft angle derived from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance GearboxAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑series of gearbox output angle derived from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBrokerEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque τ computed by the dynamics calculation model from angle, velocity and acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity ω computed by the dynamics calculation model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorMountEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance SysMLFirstAxisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagrams of the first rotational axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Executable MATLAB/Simulink model of the motor (frictionless) for the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink model of the gearwheel component of the gearbox"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink friction models of the gearbox (Coulomb‑Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

instance DynamicsCalculationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data calculation model converting input angle, velocity and acceleration to torque"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkRuntimeEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker that receives live sensor streams and stores them in DataTraces"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, TorqueVelocityVisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkRuntimeEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink execution environment used for simulation and friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService, ModelParameterUpdateService, FrictionLossReportService
]

instance WebDashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Web‑based dashboard visualizing measured and simulated torque/velocity and reporting friction losses"
    DTDFVocab:enables TorqueVelocityVisualizationService, FrictionLossReportService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell representing the robot asset and exposing models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelParameterUpdateService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time identification of gearbox friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) using live sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParameterInsight, MotionControlImprovementInsight
]

instance TorqueVelocityVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visualization of measured and simulated torque and angular velocity on a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenanceDecisionInsight
]

instance ModelParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model‑based updating of friction and motion parameters to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides FeedBackFrictionParametersAction
]

instance FrictionLossReportService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of friction‑loss reports for engineering decision support"
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateFrictionLossReportAction, MaintenanceDecisionInsight
]

// C17: Insights
instance FrictionParameterInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived friction parameters (static, kinetic, viscous) identified from live data"
]

instance MotionControlImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight that updated friction parameters can be fed back to the robot controller to improve motion control accuracy"
]

instance MaintenanceDecisionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard reports indicating maintenance needs and optimal tool selection based on friction losses"
]

// C17: Actions
instance FeedBackFrictionParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic feeding of identified friction parameters to the SINUMERIK 840D controller"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance GenerateFrictionLossReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic generation of PDF/HTML friction‑loss report for engineering review"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is defined as a one‑way data flow; no commands or control signals are sent back to the physical robot."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow composed of a Purpose (FrictionDerivation), an Asset (MABI robot first axis), Sources (sensor channels), Processing components (Simulation_M, Simulation_GW, Simulation_GB) that consume input data traces and produce simulated traces, and Models (engineering, simulation, data calculation) linked via the Digital Shadow Reference Model; all data are visualized in a dashboard."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each DataPoint to its source and processing model; validation by comparing simulated torque/velocity traces against measured reference traces; multi‑physics aware identification to capture load, temperature, wear effects; use of both white‑box (analytical) and black‑box (data‑driven) friction models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Sensor data are transmitted from the robot to the digital shadow using the MQTT protocol; the Asset Administration Shell provides standardized metadata linking."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of the Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standard for asset description and SysML as an MBSE modeling standard."
]
